title: Evaluate Composition Strategies
description: Contrast Server-Side, Client-Side, and Build-time composition strategies for Micro-Frontends. Evaluate the impact of different composition strategies on SEO and application performance. Analyze how various composition approaches affect team autonomy and development workflows.
objectives: Contrast Server-Side, Client-Side, and Build-time composition strategies for Micro-Frontends.
Evaluate the impact of different composition strategies on SEO and application performance.
Analyze how various composition approaches affect team autonomy and development workflows.
